sections.markdown:
- Activity: Afternoon Run
- Started: 2025-06-19 17:06
- Distance: 6.6 km
- Moving time: 35:30
- Elapsed time: 35:35
- Elevation gain: 126 m
- Average heart rate: 171.4 bpm
- Max heart rate: 182 bpm
- Average watts: 214 W
- Average speed: 11.2 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `2` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `170.3 bpm`, ranging from `165.0` to `175.7 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `174.5 spm`, with a working range of `172.0` to `176.0 spm` after excluding `2` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `174.5 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `174.6 spm` (+0.1 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:22 /km` across `6.623 km` in `35:30` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:13 /km` and second-half pace was `5:31 /km` (+18 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `171.4 bpm` average and `182 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `166.8 bpm` in the first half and `175.8 bpm` in the second (+9.0 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `35:30` out of `35:35` elapsed (99.8%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `3` stop segments and `0.3%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `130.4 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `41.6 m` and `61.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `54.2 m` in the first half and `76.2 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
